name: Country Pork Stew
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Potatoes with skins, scrubbed and cubed
1 medium Zucchini, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except cornstarch and 2 cups water, in a slow cooker.
2. Stir to blend the contents.
3. Cover and cook on Setting #3 (or Low) for 7-9 hours, or on Setting #5 (High) for 4-5 hours.
4. Increase heat to High.
5. In a small bowl, combine cornstarch and 2 cups water. Stir slowly into the stew until thickened.
